title: Bring Me a Dream
overview: On the run for murder, Avery Quinn bursts into Alpha Omega Pi house looking for help. Desperate to prove her innocence and her sanity, she holds a handful of people hostage and as a last resort, she summons the legendary Sandman and now everyone has two choices: Face their worst nightmares...or...die!
